name: IAM Drift — Managed Identity deleted
failure_mode: The AegisAP worker's Managed Identity is deleted or role assignments are removed. The app attempts to call Azure OpenAI but receives 401 Unauthorized.
detection: Azure Monitor alert on 401 spike from worker ACA app. gate_actor_binding fails when obo_contract.json actor_binding_ok=false.
remediation: 1. Restore MI or reassign role. 2. Restart ACA revision to force fresh token acquisition. 3. Re-run verify_delegated_identity_contract.py.
